autonomy.description: Output gate. "shadow_only" surfaces predictions internally but never writes person/group properties or emits events. "champion_only" writes from the active champion model. "promote_eligible" lets challenger models graduate to champion automatically when metrics pass thresholds.

config.description: Task-type-specific configuration (target event, horizon, cluster count, forecasting window, etc.). Shape depends on task_type. See the AutoML design doc for per-task fields.

inference_cadence.description: How often inference runs after the pipeline is active. One of "hourly", "daily", "weekly", "monthly", or "never" (manual only).

inference_population.description: Population definition describing who the model is scored against on each scheduled run. Usually broader than training_population.

name.description: Human-readable label for the pipeline. Shows up in the UI and in property names. Keep it short and unique within the team.

output_property_name.description: Name of the person or group property where predictions are written. Optional; if blank the pipeline emits events only.

retraining_cadence.description: How often the model is refit on a rolling window. One of "hourly", "daily", "weekly", "monthly", or "never".

task_type.description: One of "clustering", "classification", "regression", or "forecasting". Determines what kind of model is trained and how predictions are surfaced.

training_population.description: Population definition (HogQL or filter spec) describing which persons, groups, or events are eligible to be drawn into the training set.
